# 📦 Getting Started with the MRPACK Converter

Welcome to the official guide for the **AméthMC MRPACK Converter**. 

If you've downloaded a modpack from Modrinth, you likely received an `.mrpack` file. While great for the Modrinth App, these files can be difficult to install manually on a server or a third-party launcher like MultiMC or Prism Launcher.

Our tool extracts and converts these files into a standard, ready-to-use format in seconds—no installation required.

---

## 🛠️ Prerequisites
Before you begin, make sure you have:
1. An `.mrpack` file downloaded from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpacks).
2. A stable internet connection (the converter needs to download the actual mod `.jar` files specified in the pack).

---

## 🚀 Step-by-Step Guide

### Step 1: Access the Converter
Head over to the official AméthMC website: 
👉 **[AméthMC MRPACK Converter](https://amethmc.frisly.me)**

### Step 2: Upload Your File
1. Click on the upload zone in the center of the screen, or simply drag and drop your `.mrpack` file into the box.
2. The system will instantly read the file and identify the modpack name and version.

*(Tip: Make sure your file ends in `.mrpack` and not `.zip`!)*

### Step 3: Start the Conversion
1. Once the file is loaded, click the **Convert** button.
2. The tool will begin reading the index file and fetching the required mods directly from Modrinth's servers. 
3. **Do not close the tab** while the progress bar is moving. Depending on the size of the modpack (some have 200+ mods!), this can take anywhere from a few seconds to a couple of minutes.

### Step 4: Download Your Archive
Once the progress bar reaches 100%, a **Download** button will appear. 
Click it to save your newly generated `.zip` file.

### Step 5: Install and Play
You can now take this generated `.zip` file and extract it directly into your Minecraft server's root folder, or import it into your favorite Minecraft launcher.

---

## 🛑 Running into issues?
If the conversion fails, hangs at 99%, or gives you an error code, don't worry! 

Check out our **[Troubleshooting Guide](./troubleshooting.md)** for quick fixes, or [open a Bug Report](https://github.com/DevFrisly/YOUR-REPO-NAME/issues) if you think the converter itself is broken.
